allow: PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\first_repository; $env:PYTHONPATH="C:\\first_repository\\backend"; Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\first_repository\\backend" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru | Select-Object Id)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "ERROR: $_" })

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('data',[]\); print\('totalCount:', d.get\('totalCount'\)\); [print\(i, '|', item.get\('jobName','?'\), '| envStndWalk:', item.get\('envStndWalk','?'\)\) for i,item in enumerate\(items\)]")

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/jobs/live-with-env?pageNo=1&numOfRows=3" -UseBasicParsing; $data = $resp.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "totalCount: $\($data.totalCount\)"; foreach \($item in $data.data\) { Write-Output "$\($item.jobName\) | envStndWalk: $\($item.envStndWalk\) | envEyesight: $\($item.envEyesight\)" })

PowerShell($resp = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { $null }; if \($resp\) { Write-Output "Frontend up: $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } else { Write-Output "Frontend down" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; $resp = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 } catch { $null }; if \($resp\) { Write-Output "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $html = $resp.Content; if \($html -match '접근성 \\d+점'\) { Write-Output "접근성점수=FOUND: $\($Matches[0]\)" } else { Write-Output "접근성점수=NOT FOUND" }; if \($html -match 'AI'\) { Write-Output "AI text still present" } else { Write-Output "AI text clean" } } else { Write-Output "Still down, checking logs..."; Get-Content "C:\\first_repository\\frontend_stderr.log" -Tail 20 })
